schemas.name: Virtual Auditor

mainEntity.name: What is included in payroll service?

acceptedAnswer.text: Salary computation, TDS calculation and deposit, ESI/PF filing, payslip generation, reimbursement processing, and annual Form 16. CTC structuring advisory included at onboarding.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle ESI and PF?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We compute employer and employee contributions, file monthly returns, and handle annual reconciliation for both ESI and PF.

mainEntity.name: What is included in payroll processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly salary computation, PF/ESI calculations, professional tax deduction, TDS on salary (Section 192), payslip generation, bank transfer file preparation, statutory challan payments, and quarterly TDS returns.

mainEntity.name: How much does payroll service cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: From ₹100 per employee per month (minimum ₹3,000/month). Includes: salary processing, PF/ESI compliance, TDS computation, payslips, and quarterly returns. Year-end Form 16: included. Full and final settlement: ₹500 per exit.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle PF and ESI compliance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Monthly PF challan (by 15th), ESI challan (by 15th), UAN generation for new employees, PF transfer (Form 13), PF withdrawal assistance, and annual PF/ESI returns.

mainEntity.name: Can you process payroll for contract workers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Section 194C TDS for contractors, Section 194J for professionals. Separate TDS treatment from regular employees. Quarterly return filing (26Q for non-salary, 24Q for salary). Form 16A for contractors.

mainEntity.name: What is the deadline for PF and ESI deposit?

acceptedAnswer.text: PF: 15th of following month. ESI: 15th of following month. Delay: interest at 12% p.a. (PF) and damages (ESI). We ensure timely deposit with automated calendar reminders.
